Location Ka Faayda

Kyun Yeh Regions?

Yamuna Expressway / Jewar  •  Goverdhan / Vrindavan  •  Dholera

🛫

Noida International Airport, Jewar — Asia ka sabse bada upcoming airport

🛣️

Yamuna Expressway se direct access — NCR ko Agra se jodta hai

💻

Electronics Manufacturing Cluster & Data Centre Zone nearby

🏎️

F1 Circuit (Buddh International) & Upcoming Metro Connectivity

🎬

International Film City (1000 acres) & Fintech Hub under development

🕉️

Goverdhan / Vrindavan — spiritual & tourism hub, tezi se grow kar raha hai

🏗️

Dholera Smart City — India ka pehla greenfield smart city, Gujarat mein

📈

YEIDA planned development — transparent land titles & organized layouts

Jinhone Yeh Banaya

Hamari Leadership

KN

Kapil Nagar

Founder & Legal Head

Kapil bhai ek experienced Lawyer hain, jinhone apni legal expertise ko real estate ki duniya se joda hai. 7+ saal ki property dealings mein unhone khud dekha hai ki fraud kaise hota hai — aur tabhi unhone decide kiya ki har buyer ko legal protection milni chahiye. JS Infra Group unka mission hai — har ghar, har plot, bilkul safe aur legal.

Lawyer | 7+ Saal Property Experience
TS

Tanuj Sharma

Co-Founder & Business Head

Tanuj ek sharp aur data-driven strategist hain jinka background Portfolio Advisory mein raha hai. Stock market ki discipline ko unhone real estate mein apply kiya — high-appreciation assets ko market se pehle identify karne ki unki khaas aadat hai. Unka focus hai long-term value creation aur strong partnerships.

Portfolio Advisor | Market Strategist
SS

Sanjay Sharma

External Consultant

Kareeban do dasak ka corporate project management ka tajurba, 7-8 saal entrepreneurship, aur 25 saal ki umra se real estate mein active. Sanjay bhai ka vast network aur transaction expertise JS Infra Group ko deal origination aur closure mein ek clear edge deta hai.

19+ Saal Corporate | Real Estate Broker
